TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: atip han ku Sakan nu sumamaday a Cong-kow. u zuma a kamu: nu Hulam: 筷子 nu Amilika: Chopsticks nu Zipun: はし (Hashi) u canan ku atipː . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinenganː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganː ==
S.PHON: atip ħan ku sakan nu sumamadaj a ʦoŋ-kow. u zuma a kamu: nu ħur~ɾam: ** nu amir~ɾika: ʦħopstiʦks nu zipun: ** (ħasħi) u ʦanan ku atip* . namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan* == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan* ==
S.FORM: atip han ku Sakan nu sumamaday a Cong-kow. u zuma a kamu: nu Hulam: 筷子 nu Amilika: Chopsticks nu Zipun: はし (Hashi) u canan ku atipː . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinenganː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganː ==
S.PHON: atip ħan ku sakan nu sumamadaj a ʦoŋ-kow. u zuma a kamu: nu ħur~ɾam: ** nu amir~ɾika: ʦħopstiʦks nu zipun: ** (ħasħi) u ʦanan ku atip* . namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan* == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan* ==
